rationale: Clear, well-organized consumer explainer with concrete, actionable steps and an engaging, reassuring voice. The numbered structure and examples make it easy to follow. It loses a bit on simplicity/economy because the opening is somewhat dramatic and a few lines are wordier than necessary. Precision is strong overall, though a couple of claims are a little too absolute or broad.
